label: 私について
title: About
lead: I'm Divyansh — a software engineer who lives at the seam between robust backends and interfaces people actually enjoy using.
paragraphs: I build production systems end to end: distance-based fee engines, PostGIS geo-search, event-driven pipelines with Kafka and a transactional outbox, and the native apps that sit on top of them.
My happy place is the hard middle — data models, money math, reliability — but I care just as much about how the final thing feels in your hand.
